headline: VMC Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates on Pricing and Cost Control
summary: Did Vulcan deliver a strong Q1 beat on the back of strong aggregates-led business, pricing gains and cost control efforts?

headline: EMCOR Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates, Both Rise Y/Y, Stock Up
summary: EME's shares jump after Q1 earnings and revenues beat estimates, fueled by strong demand, margin gains and a raised 2026 guidance.
